heading: Availability of information to Members of Congress designated as official advisers
label: 2517 Availability of information to Members of Congress designated as official advisers
text: The United States Trade Representative shall make available to the Members of Congress designated as official advisers pursuant to information compiled by the Committee on Government Procurement under article XIX(5) of the Agreement.section 2211 of this title
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “article XIX(5)” for “part VI, paragraph 9,”.Pub. L. 103–465

Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the date on which the Agreement on Government Procurement, referred to in , enters into force with respect to the United States (), see , set out as a note under .Pub.
